<?php namespace DeepCopy\TypeFilter\Date; use DatePeriod; use DeepCopy\TypeFilter\TypeFilter; /** * @final */ class DatePeriodFilter implements TypeFilter { /** * {@inheritdoc} * * @param DatePeriod $element * * @see http://news.php.net/php.bugs/205076 */ public function apply($element) { $options = 0; if (PHP_VERSION_ID >= 80200 && $element->include_end_date) { $options |= DatePeriod::INCLUDE_END_DATE; } if (!$element->include_start_date) { $options |= DatePeriod::EXCLUDE_START_DATE; } if ($element->getEndDate()) { return new DatePeriod($element->getStartDate(), $element->getDateInterval(), $element->getEndDate(), $options); } if (PHP_VERSION_ID >= 70217) { $recurrences = $element->getRecurrences(); } else { $recurrences = $element->recurrences - $element->include_start_date; } return new DatePeriod($element->getStartDate(), $element->getDateInterval(), $recurrences, $options); } }
